title: SoulBound Pouches
description: SoulBound Pouches are upgradable bags that keep your items safe even after death, letting you respawn with everything still tucked inside. With multiple tiers and future upgrades on the way, they’re your personal pocket dimension — minus the void risk.
body:
Die less. Drop less. Stress less.

Ever lost your best gear to a stupid lava dive or creeper sneak attack? Yeah. Not anymore.

[JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER](https://discord.gg/2vPV7QPNQ8)
That’s where updates, feedback, chaos, and ideas go first.

SoulBound Pouches are upgradeable inventory bags that don’t disappear when you die. They stay in your inventory. No graves, no “oops I forgot where I died,” no full reset. If it was in the pouch, it’s still with you.

How it actually works:

You craft a basic pouch. Throw stuff in it. That pouch stays with you after death—just like a soulbound item would.

Need more space? Upgrade it to a Greater Pouch (and eventually better ones) for double the slots.

TL;DR:
You die, you respawn, pouch is still there. So is your stuff inside it. Easy.

📈 What’s coming:

More pouch tiers (bigger bags, better binding)

Custom upgrades

Auto-sorting and other QoL stuff for your ghost life
